title: taraxacum fragile
intro: Taraxacum fragile, also known as the fragile dandelion or fragile dandelion weed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus, Taraxacum. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum fragile include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting liver function, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral properties. Taraxacum fragile can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile ingredient in herbal remedies.
